response.justification: While the candidate possesses extensive overall software engineering experience and strong technical leadership skills, their background is heavily focused on full-stack web development (Node.js, TypeScript) and DLang. They lack the deep, recent C++ expertise, industrial automation domain knowledge, and specific cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) required for this core C++ role.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience with strong proficiency in Agile methodologies, TDD, and CI/CD.
Demonstrated technical leadership, mentoring, and community contribution through workshops and open-source projects.
Possesses several advantageous skills listed in the job description, including Node.js, React, and REST API development.
concerns: Very limited and outdated C++ experience (approximately 7 months in 2014-2015), which is the primary technical requirement.
Lacks experience with industrial automation, IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA), and message-broker architectures.
No demonstrated exposure to Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices per IEC 62443 standards.
